reviews.review_description: Very relaxing once you get the hang of it, plus all of the options allows you to customize your experience pretty much any way you'd like! Recommend if you want a shooting challenge!

This game is honestly really fun to me. I didn't expect I'd have as much with this as I did. You get to customize how your game play in multitudes of way. Such as changing how many rounds there are, if you want unlimited ammo or not, difficulty going from easy to hard, laser sight or none, etc. Honestly the only way that I think would make this better, would have been if it could let me customize the towers that shoot out the discs. It's got a calming, forested lake view. There's a bit of a wooden cabin. I think it's super cute with how it is. For sticklers, who know that if you don't hold the gun with both hands due to the recoil, then this game is perfect, because they even mention that before you start playing, that they included recoil. Overall, I give it 5 out of 5. I'm going to go back to playing it again now.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Adding some settings that control how the tower works is a good idea :)

reviews.review_description: It’s not gonna blow your socks off or anything but the shooting is accurate (which is incredibly important with this type of game) and it’s pretty fun trying to beat your score. It would actually be a blast if there was multiplayer.

developer_response.body: Thank you! Multiplayer w/ a leaderboard is being worked on!

reviews.review_description: I love this game it is so fun it’s letting me practice for when I get a real gun
I know it's not complete don't have the black background  can't see because barrel and rib blend in with background gun don't feel right aiming feels like you got to hold gun out infront of you.
